leaf_state_basis: GpsTime decode of extracted points -> 2015-05-02; northern Michigan (45.37N) deciduous leaf-out is mid-to-late May, so this is a LEAF-OFF (winter-screen) collection. Operating season is summer.
classification_note: delivery has NO ASPRS veg(3/4/5) or building(6) classes; canopy derived from CHM=DSM-DTM with OSM footprints subtracted
leafon_variant: crown-opacity inflation: binary_closing(iter=2) of the leaf-off canopy mask, gaps filled to local 9x9 canopy-top envelope; heights NOT raised. ASSUMPTION, not measurement.
grid: EPSG:6494 intl ft, 3 ft, NAVD88 ft elevation of canopy top
